# tenzir_library_source (Resource)

An organization-level library source: a GitHub repository from which packages are offered in the organization's workspace libraries, in addition to the platform-configured default sources. Requires org-admin credentials. All settings are changed in place.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `github_url` (String) URL of the GitHub repository, of the form `https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>`.
- `name` (String) Display name of the library source.
- `organization_id` (String) Identifier of the organization the library source belongs to.

### Optional

- `branch_or_ref` (String) Git branch or ref to fetch packages from. Defaults to `main`.
- `credential_secret_name` (String) Name of an org-scoped platform secret holding the access token for a private repository. Unset means a public repository. The token itself is stored separately and never passes through this resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the library source.
